notes.body:
write a prompt for Perplexity Computer, telling it whats left to get done, what has/not been started yet, and anything that is still not working.

lets do all the possibles also if they have uses that can help in the long run but write me a ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA! ;N? hA!
